mapper.sql: grant_id, user_id, payment_id, grant_type, status, granted_at, expires_at, revoked_at, revoke_reason, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM premium_grants WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY grant_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM premium_grants ORDER BY grant_id DESC

SELECT
FROM premium_grants WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY grant_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO premium_grants ( user_id, payment_id, grant_type, status, granted_at, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{paymentId}, #{grantType}, #{status}, #{grantedAt}, #{expiresAt} )
INSERT INTO premium_grants ( user_id, payment_id, grant_type, status, granted_at, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{paymentId}, 'LIFETIME', 'ACTIVE', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE premium_grants SET status = 'REVOKED', revoked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, revoke_reason = #{revokeReason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE premium_grants SET user_id = #{userId}, payment_id = #{paymentId}, grant_type = #{grantType}, status = #{status}, granted_at = #{grantedAt}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, revoked_at = #{revokedAt}, revoke_reason = #{revokeReason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE grant_id = #{grantId}
